## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what this PR changes and why. -->

## Related issue(s)

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Relates to #456 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore (tooling, dependencies, CI, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, docs, or code comments) if needed
- [ ] Changeset added via `pnpm changeset` (for changes to a published package)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] Accessibility considered for UI changes (keyboard support, ARIA attributes, focus management)
